scripts.reset:insforge: npx @insforge/cli -y storage delete-bucket assets; bun run insforge:bucket; npx @insforge/cli db query "delete from cafe_media;"
scripts.sync:insforge: find assets -type f ! -name manifest.json ! -name .DS_Store -exec sh -c 'for file do handle=$(basename "$(dirname "$file")"); base=$(basename "$file"); post=${base#post-}; post=${post%%-*}; ext=${base##*.}; key="$handle-post-$post.$ext"; npx @insforge/cli storage upload "$file" --bucket assets --key "$key"; done' sh {} +
scripts.sync:insforge-all: bun run reset:insforge && bun run sync:insforge && bun run sync:insforge-media
